zh.lifeSummary: Prudence Skelton於大約1595年出生在英國貝德福爾。她於1606年1月15日與John Wilkinson在英國貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1655年1月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Prudence Skelton于大约1595年出生在英国貝德福爾。她于1606年1月15日与John Wilkinson在英国貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1655年1月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Skelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name mainly from Skelton in Cumberland, or any of various places called Skelton in Yorkshire, North Yorkshire, and East Yorkshire. The placenames probably all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, with initial Sk-, instead of Sh-, due to Scandinavian influence. However, in some cases, the first element may be a lost river name, from Old Norse skjallr ‘resounding’; compare Skelding . This English surname has been established in Queen's County [Laois], Ireland, since the 16th century.

variants.name: Skelding
meanings: English: habitational name from Skelding (Yorkshire). The place takes its name from the river Skell, itself from Old Norse skjallr ‘resounding’, + Old English denu ‘valley’. In addition, the name may come from Skeldon (Ayrshire), although there is a lack of evidence for a historic presence in this part of Scotland.

variants.name: Skilton
meanings: English (Surrey): probably a variant of Skelton , though in some cases the name may be a variant of Shilton, a habitational name from Shilton (Warwickshire, Oxfordshire) or Earl Shilton (Leicestershire), from Old English scelf, scylf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Prudence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval form of the Latin name Prudentia, a feminine form of Prudentius, from prudens ‘provident’. The Blessed Prudentia was a 15th-century abbess who founded a new convent at Como in Italy. Later, among the Puritans in 17th-century England, Prudence was associated with the vocabulary word for the quality.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Prudence Skelton was born about 1595, in Bedfordshire, England. She married John Wilkinson on 15 January 1606, in Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 9 January 1655, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Prudence Skeltonは約1595年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた。1606年1月15日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでJohn Wilkinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1655年1月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンで61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Prudence Skelton(은)는 대략 1595년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1606년 1월 15일 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 John Wilkinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1655년 1월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Prudence Skelton nasceu aproximadamente 1595, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Wilkinson em 15 de janeiro de 1606, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1655, em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Prudence Skelton родилась около 1595 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wilkinson 15 января 1606 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 9 января 1655 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Prudence Skelton nació aproximadamente 1595, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con John Wilkinson el 15 de enero de 1606, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1655, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
